infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tradie uses your camera to take photos of job sites and completed work for quotes and invoices.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Tradie syncs your scheduled jobs to your calendar so you never miss an appointment.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Tradie accesses your contacts to quickly add customer details when creating bookings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tradie accesses your photo library to attach photos of job sites and completed work.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tradie uses your location to calculate travel distance for job quotes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tradie uses your microphone for audio recording when documenting job sites.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Tradie saves photos of completed jobs to your photo library.
